```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(here)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(colorRamp2)
#library(ReactomePA) # can't install this
library(clusterProfiler)
library(DOSE)
library(readr)
source(here("scripts/00_get_crossSigs_enrichedGO.R"))
library(gridExtra)
library(grid)
library(tibble)
library(tidyr)
library(gt)
library(knitr)
```

```{r}
marray_path_dn <- here("data/v2/microarray_pathways/dn")
rnaseq_path_dn <- here("data/v2/RNAseq_pathways/dn")
```

```{r}
pattern <- "allterms_GO_ORA_BGcorrected"
prefix_sub <- "allterms_GO_ORA_BGcorrected"
suffix_sub <- "dn.tsv"
annotation_file = here('data/metadata/direct-annotations__Homo_sapiens__Entrez.tsv')
```

```{r read in summary table}
summary_df <- read.delim(here("data/metadata/202506_all_TB_signatures_info.tsv"), sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
summary_df
```

### dnregulated genes' pathways

```{r microarray dn pathway}
marray_GO_mat_dn = get_GO_testStat_matrix(marray_path_dn, pattern, prefix_sub, suffix_sub)
colnames(marray_GO_mat_dn) <- gsub("_dn.tsv", "", colnames(marray_GO_mat_dn))
colnames(marray_GO_mat_dn) <- gsub(".tsv", "", colnames(marray_GO_mat_dn))
cols_to_keep_marray <- intersect(colnames(marray_GO_mat_dn), c("Description", summary_df$SIGNATURE_NAME, "dn_aggregated_microarray"))
marray_GO_mat_dn <- marray_GO_mat_dn[, cols_to_keep_marray]
```

```{r RNAseq dn pathway}
rnaseq_GO_mat_dn = get_GO_testStat_matrix(rnaseq_path_dn, pattern, prefix_sub, suffix_sub)
colnames(rnaseq_GO_mat_dn) <- gsub("_dn.tsv", "", colnames(rnaseq_GO_mat_dn))
colnames(rnaseq_GO_mat_dn) <- gsub(".tsv", "", colnames(rnaseq_GO_mat_dn))
cols_to_keep_rnaseq <- intersect(colnames(rnaseq_GO_mat_dn), c("Description", summary_df$SIGNATURE_NAME, "dn_aggregated_RNAseq"))
rnaseq_GO_mat_dn <- rnaseq_GO_mat_dn[, cols_to_keep_rnaseq]
```

```{r combine microarray and RNAseq}
df1 <- marray_GO_mat_dn
df2 <- rnaseq_GO_mat_dn

# Reshape from wide to long
library(tidyr)
long1 <- pivot_longer(df1, -Description, names_to = "Signature", values_to = "Value")
long2 <- pivot_longer(df2, -Description, names_to = "Signature", values_to = "Value")

# Combine long formats and sum values where matching
library(dplyr)
combined_long <- bind_rows(long1, long2) %>%
  group_by(Description, Signature) %>%
  summarise(
  Value = if (all(is.na(Value))) NA_real_ else max(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
  .groups = "drop"
)

# Reshape back to wide format
final_df_dn <- pivot_wider(combined_long, names_from = Signature, values_from = Value)
colnames(final_df_dn) <- gsub("\\.", "-", colnames(final_df_dn))

# Identify columns with "aggregated" in their names
agg_cols <- grep("aggregated", names(final_df_dn), value = TRUE)

# Identify columns that do not contain "aggregated"
non_agg_cols <- setdiff(names(final_df_dn), agg_cols)

# Reorder the dataframe
final_df_dn <- final_df_dn[, c(non_agg_cols, agg_cols)]
# Identify columns
desc_col <- grep("Description", names(final_df_dn), value = TRUE)
gpl_cols <- grep("GPL", names(final_df_dn), value = TRUE)
rnaseq_col <- grep("RNAseq", names(final_df_dn), value = TRUE)
other_cols <- setdiff(names(final_df_dn), c(gpl_cols, rnaseq_col))

# Reorder dataframe
final_df_dn <- final_df_dn[, c(desc_col, gpl_cols, other_cols, rnaseq_col)]
final_df_dn <- final_df_dn[, !duplicated(colnames(final_df_dn))]
final_df_dn <- final_df_dn[, !grepl("HIV", colnames(final_df_dn))]
```

```{r}
GO_annotation = get_GO_annotation(here(annotation_file))
```

```{r prepare matrix}
rnaseq_marray_GO_mat_dn <- final_df_dn
go_mat = rnaseq_marray_GO_mat_dn
# set rownames to GO term descriptions and remove Description column
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat %>%
  column_to_rownames("Description")

# clean up column names (remove "_dn")
colnames(go_mat_filtered) <- gsub("_dn$", "", colnames(go_mat_filtered))

# keep only columns present in the summary
common_sigs <- intersect(colnames(go_mat_filtered), summary_df$SIGNATURE_NAME)
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat_filtered[, common_sigs]
```

### Mann-Whitney Tests

```{r functions}
# Compute median difference per GO term
calculate_median_diff <- function(values, group1, group2, group_vec) {
  # Get the values for group 1
  group_1_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == group1])])
  
  # Get the values for group 2
  group_2_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == group2])])
  
  # Calculate the median for each group
  group_1_median <- median(group_1_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
  group_2_median <- median(group_2_vals, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # Calculate the difference
  diff <- group_1_median - group_2_median
  
  return(diff)
}

# Mann-Whitney test
Mann_Whitney_test <- function(values, group1, group2, group_vec) {
  group_1_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == group1])])
  group_2_vals <- as.numeric(values[names(group_vec[group_vec == group2])])
  
  if (sum(!is.na(group_1_vals)) > 0 && sum(!is.na(group_2_vals)) > 0) {
    test <- wilcox.test(group_1_vals, group_2_vals, exact = TRUE)
    out <- data.frame(
      p_value   = unname(test$p.value),
      statistic = unname(test$statistic)
    )
  } else {
    out <- data.frame(
      p_value   = NA_real_,
      statistic = NA_real_
    )
  }
  
  return(out)
}
```

```{r circulating vs. lung}
summary_df_tissue = summary_df %>% filter(!is.na(signature), !is.na(tissue_category)) %>%
            dplyr::select(SIGNATURE_NAME, tissue_category)
circulating_num = length(summary_df$tissue_category[summary_df_tissue$tissue_category == "circulating"])
lung_num = length(summary_df$tissue_category[summary_df_tissue$tissue_category == "lung"])

# build group vector
group_vec_tissue <- summary_df_tissue %>%
  filter(SIGNATURE_NAME %in% common_sigs) %>%
  distinct(SIGNATURE_NAME, tissue_category) %>%
  deframe()

tissue_median_diffs_df <- apply(
  go_mat_filtered,
  1,
  calculate_median_diff, 
  group1 = "circulating", 
  group2 = "lung",
  group_vec = group_vec_tissue
)

tissue_median_diffs_df <- data.frame(GO_term = rownames(go_mat_filtered), median_diff = tissue_median_diffs_df)

# Mann-Whitney test
tissue_MW_test <- do.call(
  rbind,
  lapply(seq_len(nrow(go_mat_filtered)), function(i) {
    Mann_Whitney_test(
      values    = go_mat_filtered[i, ],
      group1    = "circulating",
      group2    = "lung",
      group_vec = group_vec_tissue
    )
  })
)
rownames(tissue_MW_test) <- rownames(go_mat_filtered)
tissue_MW_test$GO_term <- rownames(go_mat_filtered)

tissue_MW_results <- tissue_MW_test %>%
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
  left_join(tissue_median_diffs_df, by = "GO_term") %>%
  dplyr::select(GO_term, median_diff, p_value, statistic, p_adj)
tissue_MW_results$auroc <- tissue_MW_results$statistic / (circulating_num * lung_num)
tissue_MW_results$norm_auroc <- (2 * tissue_MW_results$auroc) - 1
```

```{r}
write_tsv(tissue_MW_results, here("figures/dn_allvals_circulating_lung_MW.tsv"))
```

```{r differentiating terms in gt format}
# Top 10 GO terms
top10_positive_tissue <- tissue_MW_results %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05) %>% filter(median_diff > 0)  %>% arrange(desc(median_diff)) %>% dplyr::slice(1:10)
top10_negative_tissue <- tissue_MW_results %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05) %>% filter(median_diff < 0) %>% arrange(median_diff) %>% dplyr::slice(1:10)

# Create gt tables
gt_top10_positive_tissue <- top10_positive_tissue %>%
  dplyr::select(GO_term, median_diff, p_value, p_adj) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Top 10 GO terms enriched in circulating") %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO term",
    median_diff = "Median difference (circulating - lung)",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  ) %>%
  fmt_scientific(columns = c(median_diff, p_value, p_adj))

gt_top10_negative_tissue <- top10_negative_tissue %>%
  dplyr::select(GO_term, median_diff, p_value, p_adj) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Top 10 GO terms enriched in lung") %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO term",
    median_diff = "Median difference (circulating - lung)",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  ) %>%
  fmt_scientific(columns = c(median_diff, p_value, p_adj))

# Combine top 10 positive and negative as a single dataframe first
top_combined_df_tissue <- bind_rows(
  top10_positive_tissue %>% mutate(Enriched_in = "Circulating"),
  top10_negative_tissue %>% mutate(Enriched_in = "Lung")
)

# Create one combined gt table
gt_top_bottom_tissue <- top_combined_df_tissue %>%
  dplyr::select(GO_term, Enriched_in, median_diff, p_value, p_adj) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Top dnregulated GO terms more enriched in circulating or lung") %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    Enriched_in = "Enriched in",
    median_diff = "Median difference (circulating - lung)",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  ) %>%
  fmt_scientific(columns = c(median_diff, p_value, p_adj))

# Display combined table
gtsave(gt_top_bottom_tissue, "dn_allvals_variance_circulating_lung_signiGO_terms.html")

```

```{r microarray vs. RNASeq}
summary_df_tech = summary_df %>% filter(!is.na(signature), !is.na(technology)) %>%
            dplyr::select(SIGNATURE_NAME, technology)
# build group vector
group_vec_technology <- summary_df_tech %>%
  filter(SIGNATURE_NAME %in% common_sigs) %>%
  distinct(SIGNATURE_NAME, technology) %>%
  deframe()

technology_median_diffs_df <- apply(
  go_mat_filtered,
  1,
  calculate_median_diff, 
  group1 = "microarray",  
  group2 = "RNAseq",
  group_vec = group_vec_technology
)

technology_median_diffs_df <- data.frame(GO_term = rownames(go_mat_filtered), median_diff = technology_median_diffs_df)

# Mann-Whitney test
technology_MW_test <- do.call(
  rbind,
  lapply(seq_len(nrow(go_mat_filtered)), function(i) {
    Mann_Whitney_test(
      values    = go_mat_filtered[i, ],
      group1    = "microarray",
      group2    = "RNAseq",
      group_vec = group_vec_technology
    )
  })
)
rownames(technology_MW_test) <- rownames(go_mat_filtered)
technology_MW_test$GO_term <- rownames(go_mat_filtered)

technology_MW_results <- technology_MW_test %>%
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
  left_join(technology_median_diffs_df, by = "GO_term") %>%
  dplyr::select(GO_term, median_diff, p_value, statistic, p_adj)
technology_MW_results$auroc <- technology_MW_results$statistic / (circulating_num * lung_num)
technology_MW_results$norm_auroc <- (2 * technology_MW_results$auroc) - 1
```

```{r}
write_tsv(technology_MW_results, here("figures/dn_allvals_microarray_rnaseq_MW.tsv"))
```

```{r}
# Top 10 GO terms
top10_positive_tech <- technology_MW_results %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05) %>% filter(median_diff > 0)  %>% arrange(desc(median_diff)) %>% dplyr::slice(1:10)
top10_negative_tech <- technology_MW_results %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05) %>% filter(median_diff < 0) %>% arrange(median_diff) %>% dplyr::slice(1:10)

# Create gt tables
gt_top10_positive_tech <- top10_positive_tech %>%
  dplyr::select(GO_term, median_diff, p_value, p_adj) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Top 10 GO terms enriched in microarray") %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    median_diff = "Median difference (microarray - RNAseq)",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  )

gt_top10_negative_tech <- top10_negative_tech %>%
  dplyr::select(GO_term, median_diff, p_value, p_adj) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Top 10 GO terms enriched in RNAseq") %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    median_diff = "Median difference (microarray - RNAseq)",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  )

# Combine top 10 positive and negative as a single dataframe first
top_combined_df_microarray_rnaseq <- bind_rows(
  top10_positive_tech %>% mutate(Enriched_in = "Microarray"),
  top10_negative_tech %>% mutate(Enriched_in = "RNAseq")
)

# Create one combined gt table
gt_top_bottom_tech <- top_combined_df_microarray_rnaseq %>%
  dplyr::select(GO_term, Enriched_in, median_diff, p_value, p_adj) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Top dnregulated GO terms more enriched in microarray or RNAseq") %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    Enriched_in = "Enriched In",
    median_diff = "Median difference (microarray - RNAseq)",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  ) %>%
  fmt_scientific(columns = c(median_diff, p_value, p_adj))

# Display combined table
gtsave(gt_top_bottom_tech, "dn_allvals_variance_microarray_rnaseq_signiGO_terms.html")
```

```{r cell line vs. primary}
summary_df_origin = summary_df %>% filter(!is.na(signature), !is.na(technology)) %>%
            dplyr::select(SIGNATURE_NAME, sample_origin)
# build group vector
group_vec_origin <- summary_df_origin %>%
  filter(SIGNATURE_NAME %in% common_sigs) %>%
  distinct(SIGNATURE_NAME, sample_origin) %>%
  deframe()

origin_median_diffs_df <- apply(
  go_mat_filtered,
  1,
  calculate_median_diff, 
  group1 = "primary",  
  group2 = "cell line",
  group_vec = group_vec_origin
)

origin_median_diffs_df <- data.frame(GO_term = rownames(go_mat_filtered), median_diff = origin_median_diffs_df)

# Mann-Whitney test
origin_MW_test <- do.call(
  rbind,
  lapply(seq_len(nrow(go_mat_filtered)), function(i) {
    Mann_Whitney_test(
      values    = go_mat_filtered[i, ],
      group1    = "primary",
      group2    = "cell line",
      group_vec = group_vec_origin
    )
  })
)
rownames(origin_MW_test) <- rownames(go_mat_filtered)
origin_MW_test$GO_term <- rownames(go_mat_filtered)

origin_MW_results <- origin_MW_test %>%
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
  left_join(origin_median_diffs_df, by = "GO_term") %>%
  dplyr::select(GO_term, median_diff, p_value, statistic, p_adj)
origin_MW_results$auroc <- origin_MW_results$statistic / (circulating_num * lung_num)
origin_MW_results$norm_auroc <- (2 * origin_MW_results$auroc) - 1
```

```{r}
write_tsv(origin_MW_results, here("figures/dn_allvals_primary_cellline_MW.tsv"))
```

```{r}
# Top 10 GO terms
top10_positive_origin <- origin_MW_results %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05) %>% filter(median_diff > 0)  %>% arrange(desc(median_diff)) %>% dplyr::slice(1:10)
top10_negative_origin <- origin_MW_results %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05) %>% filter(median_diff < 0) %>% arrange(median_diff) %>% dplyr::slice(1:10)

# Create gt tables
gt_top10_positive_origin <- top10_positive_origin %>%
  dplyr::select(GO_term, median_diff, p_value, p_adj) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Top 10 GO terms enriched in primary") %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    median_diff = "Median difference (primary - cell line)",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  )

gt_top10_negative_origin <- top10_negative_origin %>%
  dplyr::select(GO_term, median_diff, p_value, p_adj) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Top 10 GO terms enriched in cell line") %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    median_diff = "Median difference (primary - cell line)",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  )

# Combine top 10 positive and negative as a single dataframe first
top_combined_df_microarray_rnaseq <- bind_rows(
  top10_positive_origin %>% mutate(Enriched_in = "Primary"),
  top10_negative_origin %>% mutate(Enriched_in = "Cell line")
)

# Create one combined gt table
gt_top_bottom_origin <- top_combined_df_microarray_rnaseq %>%
  dplyr::select(GO_term, Enriched_in, median_diff, p_value, p_adj) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Top dnregulated GO terms more enriched in primary or cell line signatures") %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    Enriched_in = "Enriched In",
    median_diff = "Median difference (primary - cell line)",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  ) %>%
  fmt_scientific(columns = c(median_diff, p_value, p_adj))

# Display combined table
gtsave(gt_top_bottom_origin, "dn_allvals_variance_primary_cellline_signiGO_terms.html")
```


#### NOT ENOUGH POWER FOR a MW test
```{r platform aggregated vs individual signatures}
# Separate the group with signatures that partially match "aggregated"
group_1_sigs <- summary_df %>% filter(grepl("aggregated", SIGNATURE_NAME)) %>% pull(SIGNATURE_NAME)
group_2_sigs <- summary_df %>% filter(!grepl("aggregated", SIGNATURE_NAME)) %>% pull(SIGNATURE_NAME)

colnames(go_mat) <- gsub("dn_", "", colnames(go_mat))

# Filter GO matrix
go_mat_filtered <- go_mat %>%
  column_to_rownames("Description") %>%
  dplyr::select(intersect(colnames(go_mat), c(group_1_sigs, group_2_sigs)))

# Build group vector
group_vec_sig <- summary_df %>%
  filter(SIGNATURE_NAME %in% colnames(go_mat_filtered)) %>%
  distinct(SIGNATURE_NAME) %>%
  mutate(group = ifelse(SIGNATURE_NAME %in% group_1_sigs, "aggregated signatures", "individual signatures")) %>%
  deframe()

sig_median_diffs_df <- apply(
  go_mat_filtered,
  1,
  calculate_median_diff, 
  group1 = "individual signatures",  
  group2 = "aggregated signatures",
  group_vec = group_vec_sig
)

sig_median_diffs_df <- data.frame(GO_term = rownames(go_mat_filtered), median_diff = sig_median_diffs_df)

# Mann-Whitney test
sig_MW_test <- do.call(
  rbind,
  lapply(seq_len(nrow(go_mat_filtered)), function(i) {
    Mann_Whitney_test(
      values    = go_mat_filtered[i, ],
      group1 = "individual signatures",  
      group2 = "aggregated signatures",
      group_vec = group_vec_sig
    )
  })
)
rownames(sig_MW_test) <- rownames(go_mat_filtered)
sig_MW_test$GO_term <- rownames(go_mat_filtered)

sig_MW_results <- sig_MW_test %>%
  mutate(p_adj = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")) %>%
  left_join(sig_median_diffs_df, by = "GO_term") %>%
  dplyr::select(GO_term, median_diff, p_value, statistic, p_adj)
sig_MW_results$auroc <- sig_MW_results$statistic / (circulating_num * lung_num)
sig_MW_results$norm_auroc <- (2 * sig_MW_results$auroc) - 1
```

```{r}
write_tsv(sig_MW_results, here("figures/dn_indiv_aggr_MW.tsv"))
```

```{r}
# Top 10 GO terms
top10_positive_sig <- sig_MW_results %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05) %>% filter(median_diff > 0)  %>% arrange(desc(median_diff)) %>% dplyr::slice(1:10)
top10_negative_sig <- sig_MW_results %>% filter(p_adj < 0.05) %>% filter(median_diff < 0) %>% arrange(median_diff) %>% dplyr::slice(1:10)

# Create gt tables
gt_top10_positive_sig <- top10_positive_sig %>%
  dplyr::select(GO_term, median_diff, p_value, p_adj) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Top 10 dnregulated GO terms enriched in individual signatures") %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    median_diff = "Median difference (individual - aggregated)",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  )

gt_top10_negative_sig <- top10_negative_sig %>%
  dplyr::select(GO_term, median_diff, p_value, p_adj) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Top 10 GO terms enriched in aggregated signatures") %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    median_diff = "Median difference (individual - aggregated)",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  )

# Combine top 10 positive and negative as a single dataframe first
top_combined_df_sig <- bind_rows(
  top10_positive_sig %>% mutate(Enriched_in = "Individual Signatures"),
  top10_negative_sig %>% mutate(Enriched_in = "Aggregated Signatures")
)

# Create one combined gt table
gt_top_bottom_sig <- top_combined_df_sig %>%
  dplyr::select(GO_term, Enriched_in, median_diff, p_value, p_adj) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Top dnregulated GO Terms More Enriched in Individual or Aggregated Signatures") %>%
  cols_label(
    GO_term = "GO Term",
    Enriched_in = "Enriched in",
    median_diff = "Median difference (individual - aggregated)",
    p_value = "Raw p-value",
    p_adj = "Adjusted p-value"
  ) %>%
  fmt_scientific(columns = c(median_diff, p_value, p_adj))

# Display combined table
gtsave(gt_top_bottom_sig, "dn_variance_indiv_aggr_signiGO_terms.html")
```
